subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast and rooted, who desireth the well-being of the loved ones of God! That which was written hath been noted, and that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ثبت و نبت و اراد الخیر لاحباء الله آنچه مسطور بود ملحوظ افتاد و آنچه
subcodes.subjects: @unity of thought and belief, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
